examples: Cossack dances are from Russia and Ukraine.
The movements are similar to traditional Cossack activities, for example, sword fighting and getting on and off horses.
In 1649 another Cossack adventurer, Yerofei Khabarov, came to the Amur.
Scythian "flying stag" discovered in a Cossack village in 1897 has become a logo piece for the museum.
The team now runs on to the pitch preceded by the sound of Cossack music, in grateful tribute to their benefactor.
